dfm[['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','work_type','reported_reason','maint_day']]=pd.NA\n    else:\n        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm.sort_values('start_ts'), svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(dfm)\nattr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nattr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\n\nrej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()\n# event stats\ninterval_stats=attr[attr['link_ok']].groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(\n    batches=('batch_id','size'),\n    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),\n    defect_modes=('defect_code', lambda s: s.mode().iat[0] if not s.mode().empty else None),\n    mean_reject_pct=('rejected_pct','mean')\n).reset_index()\n# top event-product rejects\nprint('Top work_order/product reject counts')\nprint(interval_stats[interval_stats['rejects']>0].sort_values(['rejects','batches'], ascending=[False,False]).head(60).to_string(index=False))\n\n# overall by product/defect for rejected batches\nprint('\\\\nRejected counts by product')\nprint(rej['product_id'].value_counts().head(30).to_string())\nprint('\\\\nRejected counts by product+defect top 50')\nprint(rej.groupby(['product_id','defect_code']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(50).to_string())\nprint('\\\\nRejected counts by machine+defect top 50')\nprint(rej.groupby(['machine_id_x','defect_code']).size().sort_values(ascending=False).head(50).to_string())\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

dfm[c]=pd.NA\n    else:\n        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(dfm)\nattr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nattr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr.merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\n\ninterval_stats=attr[attr['link_ok']].groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(\n    batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), mean_reject_pct=('rejected_pct','mean')\n).reset_index()\nprint('Top work_order/product reject counts')\nprint(interval_stats[interval_stats['rejects']>0].sort_values(['rejects','batches','work_order_id'], ascending=[False,False,True]).head(60).to_string(index=False))\n\nrej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()\nprint('\\\\nRejected counts by ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})\nsvc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)\ndef t2m(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nsvc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)\nsvc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)\nsvc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)\nsvc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)\n\nb=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\na=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nq=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\nprod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')\n\njobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')\njobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)\nparts=[]\nfor m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')\n    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()\n    if svcm.empty:\n        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:\n            dfm[c]=pd.NA\n    else:\n        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(dfm)\nattr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nattr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\nprod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std'), p_rej=('is_rejected','mean')).reset_index()\ninterval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(\n    batches=('batch_id','size'),\n    rejects=('is_rejected','sum'),\n    avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'),\n    min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'),\n    max_pct=('rejected_pct','max')\n).reset_index().merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')\ninterval['z']=(interval['avg_pct']-interval['mean_pct'])/interval['std_pct']\nfor zthr in [2.5,3.0,3.5,4.0,4.5]:\n    cand=interval[(interval['rejects']>=1)&(interval['z']>=zthr)]\n    tech=cand.groupby('technician_id').agg(batches=('rejects','sum'), sorted(Path('/app/raw_service_reports').rglob('*_service.txt')):\n    rec={}\n    for line in p.read_text().splitlines():\n        if ': ' in line:\n            k,v=line.split(': ',1)\n            rec[k.strip()] = v.strip()\n    records.append(rec)\nsvc=pd.DataFrame(records).rename(columns={'DAY':'day','WORK ORDER':'work_order_id','MACHINE':'machine_id','TECHNICIAN':'technician_id','WORK TYPE':'work_type','REPORTED REASON':'reported_reason','STARTED':'started','COMPLETED':'completed'})\nsvc['day']=svc['day'].astype(int)\ndef t2m(s):\n    h,m=map(int,s.split(':'))\n    return h*60+m\nsvc['start_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['started'].map(t2m)\nsvc['completed_ts']=(svc['day']-1)*1440+svc['completed'].map(t2m)\nsvc=svc.sort_values(['machine_id','completed_ts','work_order_id']).reset_index(drop=True)\nsvc['next_start_ts']=svc.groupby('machine_id')['start_ts'].shift(-1)\n\nb=pd.read_csv('/app/production_batches.csv')\na=pd.read_csv('/app/machine_assignment_log.csv')\nq=pd.read_csv('/app/quality_inspections.csv')\nprod=pd.read_csv('/app/products.csv')\n\njobs=b.merge(a[['job_id','machine_id','start_time']], on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')\njobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)\nparts=[]\nfor m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day','work_type','reported_reason']].sort_values('completed_ts')\n    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()\n    if svcm.empty:\n        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day','work_type','reported_reason']:\n            dfm[c]=pd.NA\n    else:\n        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(dfm)\nattr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nattr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','inspection_day','rejected_pct','defect_code','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\nprod_stats=attr.groupby('product_id').agg(mean_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), std_pct=('rejected_pct','std'), p_rej=('is_rejected','mean')).reset_index()\nattr=attr.merge(prod_stats,on='product_id',how='left')\nattr['z_batch']=(attr['rejected_pct']-attr['mean_pct'])/attr['std_pct']\ninterval=attr.groupby(['work_order_id','technician_id','machine_id','maint_day','product_id']).agg(\n    batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), avg_pct=('rejected_pct','mean'), min_pct=('rejected_pct','min'), max_pct=('rejected_pct','max'),\n    z_mean=('z_batch','mean'), z_max=('z_batch','max'),\n    defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s.unique()))),\n    reject_defects=('defect_code', lambda s: ','.join(sorted(s[attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']].unique())) if (attr.loc[s.index,'is_rejected']).any() else on=['job_id','machine_id'], how='left')\njobs['start_ts']=(jobs['production_day']-1)*1440+jobs['start_time'].map(t2m)\nparts=[]\nfor m, dfm in jobs.groupby('machine_id', sort=False):\n    svcm=svc[svc['machine_id']==m][['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','day']].sort_values('completed_ts')\n    dfm=dfm.sort_values('start_ts').copy()\n    if svcm.empty:\n        for c in ['work_order_id','technician_id','completed_ts','next_start_ts','maint_day']:\n            dfm[c]=pd.NA\n    else:\n        dfm=pd.merge_asof(dfm, svcm.rename(columns={'day':'maint_day'}), left_on='start_ts', right_on='completed_ts', direction='backward')\n    parts.append(dfm)\nattr=pd.concat(parts, ignore_index=True)\nattr['link_ok']=attr['completed_ts'].notna() & (attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\nattr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)\nattr['over_thr']=attr['rejected_pct']-attr['thr']\nbase=attr.groupby('product_id')['is_rejected'].mean()\ntechprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), work_orders=('work_order_id','nunique')).reset_index()\ntechprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(base[r.product_id]), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)\ninterval=attr.groupby(['technician_id','work_order_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), batches=('batch_id','size'), max_over=('over_thr','max')).reset_index()\n# criterion\ncand_pairs=[]\nfor _,r in techprod.iterrows():\n    tech,prodid=r['technician_id'],r['product_id']\n    sub=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['product_id']==prodid)]\n    cond1=(r['rejects']>=2 and r['work_orders']>=2 and r['pval']<0.05)\n    cond2=((sub['rejects']>=2).any())\n    cond3=(((sub['rejects']>=1) & (sub['max_over']>0.02)).any())\n    if cond1 or cond2 or cond3:\n        cand_pairs.append((tech,prodid,int(r['rejects']),int(r['work_orders']),r['pval'],cond1,cond2,cond3))\ncp=pd.DataFrame(cand_pairs, columns=['tech','product','rejects','work_orders','pval','cond1','cond2','cond3'])\n# confirmed techs based on these pairs\nconf=cp.groupby('tech').agg(total_rejects=('rejects','sum'), total_wos=('work_orders','sum')).reset_index()\nconf=conf[(conf['total_rejects']>=3)&(conf['total_wos']>=2)]\nprint('confirmed techs', conf.sort_values('tech').to_string(index=False))\nprint('\\\\npairs for confirmed techs')\nprint(cp[cp['tech'].isin(conf['tech'])].sort_values(['tech','product']).to_string(index=False))\nPY\"","aggregated_output":"","exit_code":null,"status":"in_progress"}}

(attr['start_ts']>attr['completed_ts']) & (attr['next_start_ts'].isna() | (attr['start_ts']<attr['next_start_ts']))\nattr=attr[attr['link_ok']].merge(q[['batch_id','rejected_pct','inspection_result']], on='batch_id', how='left')\nattr['is_rejected']=attr['inspection_result'].eq('REJECTED')\nattr['thr']=attr['product_id'].map(prod)\nattr['over_thr']=attr['rejected_pct']-attr['thr']\nbase=attr.groupby('product_id')['is_rejected'].mean()\ntechprod=attr.groupby(['technician_id','product_id']).agg(batches=('batch_id','size'), rejects=('is_rejected','sum')).reset_index()\ntechprod['pval']=techprod.apply(lambda r: binomtest(int(r.rejects), int(r.batches), float(base[r.product_id]), alternative='greater').pvalue if r.rejects>0 else 1.0, axis=1)\ninterval=attr.groupby(['technician_id','work_order_id','product_id']).agg(rejects=('is_rejected','sum'), batches=('batch_id','size'), max_over=('over_thr','max')).reset_index()\nselected=[]\nfor _,r in techprod.iterrows():\n    tech,prodid=r['technician_id'],r['product_id']\n    sub=interval[(interval['technician_id']==tech)&(interval['product_id']==prodid)]\n    condA=((sub['max_over']>0.02) & (sub['rejects']>=1)).any()\n    condB=((sub['rejects']>=2) & ((sub['rejects']/sub['batches'])>=2/3)).any()\n    condC=(r['rejects']>=2 and sub.loc[sub['rejects']>0,'work_order_id'].nunique()>=2 and r['pval']<0.01 and (((sub['rejects']/sub['batches'])>=0.5) | (sub['max_over']>0.015)).any())\n    if condA or condB or condC:\n        selected.append((tech, prodid, int(r['rejects']), int(sub.loc[sub['rejects']>0,'work_order_id'].nunique()), condA, condB, condC))\nsel=pd.DataFrame(selected, columns=['tech','product','rejects','wos','condA','condB','condC'])\nrej=attr[attr['is_rejected']].copy()\nrej_sel=rej.merge(sel[['tech','product']], left_on=['technician_id','product_id'], right_on=['tech','product'])\nconf=rej_sel.groupby('technician_id').agg(total_rejects=('batch_id','size'),
